mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.member_id AS memberId, m.first_name AS firstName, GROUP_CONCAT(i.name ORDER BY i.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS orderedItems, o.created_at AS orderDate, r.title, r.content, r.rating, r.photo_url AS photoUrl, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews r JOIN members m ON m.id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = r.order_id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN items i ON i.id = oi.item_id WHERE r.store_id = #{storeId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY r.id, r.member_id, m.first_name, o.created_at, r.title, r.content, r.rating, r.photo_url, r.created_at ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (member_id, store_id, order_id, title, content, photo_url, rating, created_at, deleted_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{storeId}, #{orderId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{photoUrl}, #{rating}, NOW(), NULL)
